tests.title: Project installs dependencies without errors
tests.given: A clean clone of the repository
tests.then: All dependencies install successfully with no peer dependency conflicts

tests.title: TypeScript compiles without errors
tests.given: Project with all source files
tests.then: Zero type errors reported

tests.title: Dev build starts and produces loadable extension
tests.given: API keys configured in .env
tests.then: Vite dev server starts, dist/ contains a valid manifest.json, and extension loads in Chrome without errors

tests.title: Production build completes successfully
tests.given: API keys configured in .env
tests.then: dist/ contains minified bundles for background worker, content script, and popup with valid manifest.json

tests.title: Environment variables are injected into background worker
tests.given: VITE_IP2LOCATION_API_KEY and VITE_ELECTRICITY_MAPS_API_KEY set in .env
tests.then: Both API key values are accessible and non-empty

tests.title: .env is excluded from version control
tests.given: A .env file exists with real API keys
tests.then: .env does not appear in tracked or untracked files

tests.title: Extension loads as unpacked in Chrome
tests.given: Production build completed
tests.when: dist/ is loaded via chrome://extensions as unpacked extension
tests.then: Extension appears with correct name, icon, and no console errors

tests.title: Extension loads as temporary add-on in Firefox
tests.given: Production build completed
tests.then: Extension appears with correct name, icon, and no console errors

tests.title: Shared type interfaces are importable across all modules
tests.given: Types defined in shared/types.ts
tests.when: Background, content, and popup modules import from @shared/types
tests.then: Imports resolve correctly and TypeScript validates usage

tests.title: Package script produces store-ready zip files
tests.given: Production build completed
tests.then: Zip files are created for Chrome and Firefox submission, containing all required assets

tests.title: Captures all PerformanceResourceTiming entries on page load
tests.given: A page with 15 resources (images, scripts, CSS, fonts)
tests.when: Page load completes and content script fires
tests.then: All 15 resource entries are captured with transferSize values

tests.title: Categorises resources by type correctly
tests.given: Resource entries with various initiatorType values
tests.then: Each resource is categorised as image, script, font, CSS, or other

tests.title: Handles pages with zero resources gracefully
tests.given: A page with no external resources
tests.then: Empty resource list is sent to background worker without error

tests.title: Handles resources with transferSize of 0 (cache hits)
tests.given: Resources served from browser cache with transferSize = 0
tests.then: Zero-size resources are included but flagged as cached

tests.title: Sends collected data to background worker
tests.given: Resources have been collected and categorised
tests.then: chrome.runtime.sendMessage is called with structured payload

tests.title: Resolves hosting country via ip2location.io
tests.given: A domain name 'example.com'
tests.then: API returns country code and result is cached for 24 hours

tests.title: Uses cached geolocation within TTL
tests.given: A geo_cache entry for 'example.com' less than 24 hours old
tests.when: Same domain is looked up again
tests.then: Cached result is returned; no API call is made

tests.title: Refreshes geolocation after cache expiry
tests.given: A geo_cache entry for 'example.com' older than 24 hours
tests.when: Same domain is looked up again
tests.then: API is called and cache is refreshed

tests.title: Fetches carbon intensity from Electricity Maps API
tests.given: Country code 'NO' (Norway)
tests.then: Returns ~30 gCO2/kWh and result is cached for 1 hour

tests.title: Falls back to global average when Electricity Maps API fails
tests.given: Electricity Maps API returns error or times out
tests.then: Falls back to 442 gCO2/kWh (global average)

tests.title: Checks green hosting via Green Web Foundation API
tests.given: A domain 'google.com' known to be green-hosted
tests.then: Returns is_green: true and caches result

tests.title: Handles Green Web Foundation API failure
tests.given: Green Web Foundation API is unreachable
tests.then: Defaults to is_green: false (conservative estimate)

tests.title: Handles ip2location.io API failure
tests.given: ip2location.io API returns error
tests.then: Falls back gracefully; uses global average carbon intensity

tests.title: Calculates CO2 correctly for a first-time visit
tests.given: Transfer size: 2MB, carbon intensity: 442 gCO2/kWh, not green-hosted
tests.when: Carbon calculation is run with visitor_factor = 1.0
tests.then: co2_grams matches formula: (data_gb * 0.81 * 1.0 * 442) + (data_gb * 0.52 * 0.25 * 442)

tests.title: Applies returning visitor adjustment
tests.given: Same page visited a second time
tests.then: visitor_factor is 0.75, reducing the score by 25%

tests.title: Applies green hosting multiplier
tests.given: Page is on a green-hosted domain
tests.then: Data centre energy component is zeroed out

tests.title: Handles zero transfer size
tests.given: Transfer size is 0 bytes (fully cached page)
tests.then: Returns 0 grams CO2 without error

tests.title: Calculates correctly for low-carbon grids
tests.given: Transfer size: 2MB, carbon intensity: 30 gCO2/kWh (Norway)
tests.then: CO2 output is significantly lower than global average calculation

tests.title: Calculates correctly for high-carbon grids
tests.given: Transfer size: 2MB, carbon intensity: 700 gCO2/kWh (Poland)
tests.then: CO2 output is significantly higher than global average calculation

tests.title: Assigns A+ grade for very low carbon pages
tests.given: CO2 result under the A+ threshold
tests.then: Returns 'A+'

tests.title: Assigns F grade for very high carbon pages
tests.given: CO2 result above the F threshold
tests.then: Returns 'F'

tests.title: Calculates correct percentile ranking
tests.given: 100 previously analysed pages with known CO2 values
tests.then: Percentile text reads 'heavier than X% of 101 pages analysed' and X is accurate

tests.title: Grade boundaries are contiguous with no gaps
tests.given: Any valid CO2 value >= 0
tests.then: Exactly one grade is returned (no overlaps or gaps in thresholds)

tests.title: Stores page result under correct key schema
tests.given: Analysis complete for example.com on 2026-04-12
tests.then: Stored under key 'page:example.com:2026-04-12' with expected fields

tests.title: Increments visit count on repeat visits
tests.given: Existing entry for page:example.com:2026-04-12 with visits: 2
tests.when: Same page is visited again on same date
tests.then: visits field incremented to 3; CO2 values are averaged/accumulated

tests.title: Updates daily totals correctly
tests.given: Existing totals for 2026-04-12 with total_co2_grams: 50, page_count: 10
tests.when: New page analysed with 3 grams CO2
tests.then: totals:2026-04-12 updated to total_co2_grams: 53, page_count: 11

tests.title: Prunes entries older than 90 days
tests.given: Storage contains entries from 100 days ago
tests.then: Entries older than 90 days are removed; recent entries remain

tests.title: Prunes expired cache entries during cleanup
tests.given: Expired geo_cache and green_cache entries exist
tests.then: Expired cache entries are removed

tests.title: Badge shows correct grade text
tests.given: Page analysis returns grade 'B'
tests.then: chrome.action.setBadgeText called with 'B'

tests.title: Badge colour is green for A+/A grades
tests.given: Page analysis returns grade 'A'
tests.then: chrome.action.setBadgeBackgroundColor called with '#27AE60'

tests.title: Badge colour is amber for B/C grades
tests.given: Page analysis returns grade 'C'
tests.then: chrome.action.setBadgeBackgroundColor called with '#F39C12'

tests.title: Badge colour is red for D/F grades
tests.given: Page analysis returns grade 'F'
tests.then: chrome.action.setBadgeBackgroundColor called with '#E74C3C'

tests.title: Popup displays current page score
tests.given: Current tab has been analysed
tests.then: Grade, CO2 grams, transfer size, energy, and green host status are displayed

tests.title: Popup shows resource breakdown
tests.given: Current page has resources across multiple categories
tests.then: Breakdown shows images, scripts, fonts, CSS, other with sizes

tests.title: Dashboard shows daily/weekly/monthly totals
tests.given: User has 7 days of browsing history
tests.then: Correct aggregated CO2 and page counts are shown

tests.title: Top 10 chart renders with D3.js
tests.given: User has visited 15+ unique domains
tests.then: D3.js horizontal bar chart shows top 10 by average CO2 per visit

tests.title: Top 10 chart handles fewer than 10 domains
tests.given: User has visited only 3 unique domains
tests.then: Chart shows 3 bars without error

tests.title: Annual estimate displays with real-world comparisons
tests.given: User has at least 7 days of data
tests.then: Shows estimated annual CO2, km driven, flights, and meals of beef equivalents

tests.title: Export generates shareable summary
tests.given: User has browsing history data
tests.then: Summary is copied to clipboard or downloaded with key stats and CarbonStamp branding

tests.title: Popup handles no data state
tests.given: Fresh install with no browsing history
tests.then: Friendly empty state message is shown; no errors

tests.title: Developer mode toggle enables detailed view
tests.given: User is in standard mode
tests.then: Per-resource list with optimisation flags is shown

tests.title: Flags uncompressed images correctly
tests.given: Page has images without content-encoding
tests.then: Uncompressed images are flagged with estimated carbon saving

tests.title: Flags render-blocking scripts
tests.given: Page has scripts without async/defer attributes
tests.then: Render-blocking scripts are flagged

tests.title: Extension loads and runs in Chrome
tests.given: Extension is installed in Chrome
tests.then: Badge updates, popup shows results, storage is populated

tests.title: Extension loads and runs in Firefox
tests.given: Extension is installed in Firefox
tests.then: Badge updates, popup shows results, storage is populated

tests.title: PerformanceResourceTiming API works across browsers
tests.given: Extension running in Chrome and Firefox
tests.then: transferSize values are captured in both browsers

tests.title: No data is sent to any external server (except APIs)
tests.given: Extension is running and analysing pages
tests.then: Only calls to ip2location.io, Electricity Maps, and Green Web Foundation are made

tests.title: Storage does not exceed 10MB limit
tests.given: 90 days of heavy browsing (500 unique domains/day)
tests.then: Total storage remains well under 10MB
